declaredLane: repo-local skill trigger and correction capture
observedMutationClass: User correction phrased as 앞으로는 could remain a conversational promise instead of becoming durable Markdown guidance.
acceptanceEvidenceClass: repo-local skill registration, trigger matrix update, and rules lint; no gameplay, Unity runtime, or WebGL product acceptance evidence
rootCause: The repo had Clarification Loop policy in codex coding guardrails, but no dedicated skill route that triggers on 앞으로는/다음부터 style correction language and forces durable owner routing. The first skill draft also carried too much policy body for a skill-entry.
prevention: Added Forward Rule Capture to ops.codex-coding-guardrails as the SSOT behavior rule, kept jg-forward-rule-capture as a thin trigger/router, registered it in skill routing, added trigger fixture T18, and preserved existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: Passed npm run --silent rules:lint and npm run --silent workflow:artifact-scope after moving the policy body into ops.codex-coding-guardrails and slimming the skill entry.
